title: Random Mobs spawn every 20 seconds
description: Every 20 seconds, a random mob spawns right on you. Pure chaos. Pure fun.
body:
Turn your world into a non-stop survival challenge. With this datapack, every 20 seconds a random mob instantly spawns at your location — no matter where you are. Caves, oceans, mountains… nowhere is safe.

🔥 Features

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21 to 1.21.10

Spawns a random mob on the player every 20s

Great for challenge videos & hardcore runs

Lightweight, multiplayer-friendly

Zero configs — just drag, drop, /reload, and survive 


⚙ How to Start the pack 

just put it in the datapack folder & run the command /funtion randomtoggle:true

and to turn it off , run /funtion randomtoggle:false
